activities.title: Deep Breathing Exercise
activities.description: Take 5 minutes to practice deep breathing
activities.descriptionFil: Maglaan ng 5 minuto para sa malalim na paghinga
tutorial: Find a comfortable seated position
Close your eyes or soften your gaze
Breathe in slowly through your nose for 4 counts
Hold your breath for 4 counts
Exhale slowly through your mouth for 6 counts
Repeat for 5 minutes
tutorialFil: Humanap ng komportableng pwesto
Ipikit ang iyong mga mata
Huminga nang malalim sa ilong (4 counts)
Pigilan ang hininga (4 counts)
Huminga palabas sa bibig (6 counts)
Ulitin ng 5 minuto

streak.message: Complete this for 7 days in a row
streak.messageFil: Gawin ito ng 7 araw na sunod-sunod

activities.title: Gratitude Journal
activities.description: Write down 3 things you're grateful for
activities.descriptionFil: Isulat ang 3 bagay na iyong pinasasalamatan
activities.journalPrompt: What are 3 things you're grateful for today?
activities.journalPromptFil: Ano ang 3 bagay na iyong pinasasalamatan ngayong araw?

activities.title: Morning Stretch
activities.description: Start your day with gentle stretching
activities.descriptionFil: Simulan ang araw sa mahinang pag-unat
tutorial: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Reach arms overhead and stretch upward
Gently bend side to side
Roll your shoulders backward 5 times
Touch your toes (or as far as comfortable)
Hold each stretch for 20-30 seconds
tutorialFil: Tumayo, paghiwalayin ang paa
Itaas ang mga braso at mag-stretch
Yumuko sa gilid (kanan at kaliwa)
I-roll ang balikat pabalik (5 beses)
Hawakan ang daliri ng paa (kung kaya)
Hawakan ang bawat stretch ng 20-30 segundo

activities.title: Hydration Check
activities.description: Track your 8 glasses of water today
activities.descriptionFil: I-track ang 8 basong tubig mo ngayon

activities.title: Mindful Walk
activities.description: Take a 15-minute walk and observe your surroundings
activities.descriptionFil: Maglakad ng 15 minuto at obserbahan ang paligid
tutorial: Find a safe, comfortable place to walk
Start walking at a comfortable pace
Notice the sensation of your feet touching the ground
Observe your surroundings - sights, sounds, smells
If your mind wanders, gently bring attention back to walking
Continue for 15 minutes
tutorialFil: Humanap ng ligtas at komportableng lugar para maglakad
Magsimulang maglakad sa komportableng bilis
Pansinin ang pakiramdam ng paa sa lupa
Obserbahan ang paligid - tanawin, tunog, amoy
Kung gumala ang isip, bumalik sa paglalakad
Magpatuloy ng 15 minuto

streak.messageFil: Maglakad nang malay 3 beses ngayong linggo

activities.title: Digital Detox
tutorial: Put your phone and devices away
Find a comfortable place to relax
Engage in a screen-free activity
Read, walk, meditate, or spend time with loved ones
Notice how you feel without screens
Continue for 30 minutes
tutorialFil: Ilagay ang iyong phone at devices
Humanap ng komportableng lugar
Gumawa ng activity na walang screen
Magbasa, maglakad, mag-meditate, o makipag-ugnayan
Pansinin kung paano ka nakakaramdam
Magpatuloy ng 30 minuto

activities.title: Meditation Session
tutorial: Sit comfortably with your back straight
Rest your hands on your lap or knees
Close your eyes gently
Focus on your natural breathing
When thoughts arise, acknowledge them and return to your breath
Continue for 10 minutes
tutorialFil: Umupo nang komportable, tuwid ang likod
Ipatong ang kamay sa hita
Ipikit ang mata
Tumuon sa natural na paghinga
Kapag may naisip, tanggapin at bumalik sa paghinga
Magpatuloy ng 10 minuto

activities.title: Healthy Meal
activities.description: Prepare and enjoy a nutritious meal
activities.descriptionFil: Maghanda at tamasahin ang masustansyang pagkain
tutorial: Choose a balanced meal with protein, vegetables, and whole grains
Include colorful vegetables for nutrients
Prepare food mindfully without distractions
Eat slowly and savor each bite
Drink water with your meal
Enjoy the experience of nourishing your body
tutorialFil: Pumili ng balanced meal na may protein, gulay, at whole grains
Kasama ang maraming kulay ng gulay
Maghanda nang maingat nang walang distraksyon
Kumain nang mabagal at lasapin ang bawat kagat
Uminom ng tubig habang kumakain
Tamasahin ang pagpapakain sa iyong katawan

activities.title: Creative Time
activities.description: Spend time on a creative hobby
activities.descriptionFil: Maglaan ng oras sa creative na libangan
tutorial: Choose a creative activity you enjoy
Set up your space with materials
Turn off distractions and notifications
Let your creativity flow without judgment
Enjoy the process, not just the result
Continue for 20 minutes
tutorialFil: Pumili ng creative activity na gusto mo
Ihanda ang iyong espasyo at materials
Patayin ang distraksyon at notifications
Hayaan ang iyong creativity na dumaloy
Tamasahin ang proseso, hindi lang resulta
Magpatuloy ng 20 minuto

activities.title: Social Connection
activities.description: Reach out to a friend or family member

streak.message: Connect with others 3 times this week

activities.title: Evening Reflection
activities.description: Reflect on your day before bed
activities.descriptionFil: Mag-isip tungkol sa iyong araw bago matulog
activities.journalPrompt: How was your day? What are you grateful for?
activities.journalPromptFil: Paano ang iyong araw? Ano ang iyong pinasasalamatan?

activities.title: Power Nap
tutorial: Find a quiet, comfortable place to rest
Set a timer for 20 minutes
Lie down or recline comfortably
Close your eyes and relax
Let yourself drift off to sleep
Wake up refreshed after 20 minutes
tutorialFil: Humanap ng tahimik at komportableng lugar
Itakda ang timer sa 20 minuto
Humiga o umupo nang komportable
Ipikit ang mata at mag-relax
Hayaan ang iyong sarili na matulog
Gumising na refreshed pagkatapos ng 20 minuto

streak.message: Rest when needed 3 times this week
streak.messageFil: Magpahinga kung kailangan 3 beses ngayong linggo
